quote: Focus on being productive instead of busy.
author: Tim Ferriss

quote: Ce qui est important est rarement urgent et ce qui est urgent est rarement important.
author: Dwight D. Eisenhower

quote: Amateurs sit and wait for inspiration, the rest of us just get up and go to work.
author: Stephen King

quote: La discipline est le pont entre les objectifs et l'accomplissement.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Done is better than perfect.
author: Sheryl Sandberg

quote: Le succès est la somme de petits efforts répétés jour après jour.
author: Robert Collier

quote: You don't need more time, you just need to decide.
author: Seth Godin

quote: La simplicité est la sophistication suprême.
author: Leonardo da Vinci

quote: Action is the foundational key to all success.
author: Pablo Picasso

quote: La constance bat le talent quand le talent n'est pas constant.
author: Inconnu

quote: What gets measured gets managed.
author: Peter Drucker

quote: La motivation vous fait commencer. L'habitude vous fait continuer.
author: Jim Ryun

quote: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
author: Walt Disney

quote: Il n'y a pas de substitut au travail acharné.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: Simplicity boils down to two steps: Identify the essential. Eliminate the rest.
author: Leo Babauta

quote: La meilleure façon de prédire l'avenir est de le créer.
author: Peter Drucker

quote: Until we can manage time, we can manage nothing else.
author: Peter Drucker

quote: L'action exprime les priorités.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
author: Arthur Ashe

quote: Petit à petit, l'oiseau fait son nid.
author: Proverbe français

quote: The key is not to prioritize what's on your schedule, but to schedule your priorities.
author: Stephen Covey

quote: La perfection est l'ennemie du bien.
author: Voltaire

quote: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

quote: Chaque minute que vous consacrez à la planification vous épargne dix minutes d'exécution.
author: Brian Tracy

quote: Either you run the day or the day runs you.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Ne remettez jamais à demain ce que vous pouvez faire aujourd'hui.
author: Thomas Jefferson

quote: Work expands to fill the time available for its completion.
author: Cyril Northcote Parkinson

quote: Un objectif sans plan n'est qu'un souhait.
author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quote: The difference between successful people and really successful people is that really successful people say no to almost everything.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Les obstacles sont ces choses effrayantes que l'on voit quand on détourne les yeux de son objectif.
author: Henry Ford

quote: You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems.
author: James Clear

quote: Rien ne sert de courir, il faut partir à point.
author: Jean de La Fontaine

quote: Efficiency is doing things right; effectiveness is doing the right things.
author: Peter Drucker

quote: Le travail éloigne de nous trois grands maux : l'ennui, le vice et le besoin.
author: Voltaire

quote: Your mind is for having ideas, not holding them.
author: David Allen

quote: La meilleure préparation pour demain est de faire de son mieux aujourd'hui.
author: H. Jackson Brown Jr.

quote: Stop managing your time. Start managing your focus.
author: Robin Sharma

quote: Le courage, c'est de commencer.
author: Anonyme

quote: Procrastination is the thief of time.
author: Edward Young

quote: Celui qui déplace des montagnes commence par enlever de petites pierres.
author: Confucius

quote: If you spend too much time thinking about a thing, you'll never get it done.
author: Bruce Lee

quote: Vouloir, c'est pouvoir.
author: Proverbe français

quote: Nothing is particularly hard if you divide it into small jobs.
author: Henry Ford

quote: Prenez soin des minutes et les heures prendront soin d'elles-mêmes.
author: Lord Chesterfield

quote: If you really want to do something, you'll find a way. If you don't, you'll find an excuse.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Le vrai changement vient de l'habitude, pas de la motivation.
author: Anonyme

quote: Your time is limited, so don't waste it living someone else's life.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: L'excellence n'est pas une aptitude. C'est une attitude.
author: Ralph Marston

quote: Perseverance is not a long race; it is many short races one after the other.
author: Walter Elliot

quote: Fais de chaque jour ton chef-d'œuvre.
author: John Wooden

quote: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
author: Confucius

quote: La clé du succès est la constance dans l'effort.
author: Benjamin Disraeli

quote: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: On ne gère pas son temps, on gère ses priorités.
author: Inconnu

quote: You've got to get up every morning with determination if you're going to go to bed with satisfaction.
author: George Lorimer

quote: Le résultat de votre vie est la somme de vos habitudes.
author: Anonyme

quote: Beware the barrenness of a busy life.
author: Socrates

quote: Il n'est jamais trop tard pour devenir ce que vous auriez pu être.
author: George Eliot

quote: Don't count the days, make the days count.
author: Muhammad Ali

quote: Faites ce que vous faites si bien que les gens voudront vous voir le refaire.
author: Walt Disney

quote: Concentrate all your thoughts upon the work in hand. The sun's rays do not burn until brought to a focus.
author: Alexander Graham Bell

quote: Chaque action que tu poses aujourd'hui est un investissement dans ton futur.
author: Anonyme

quote: It's not always that we need to do more but rather that we need to focus on less.
author: Nathan W. Morris

quote: Le progrès est impossible sans changement.
author: George Bernard Shaw

quote: Routine, in an intelligent man, is a sign of ambition.
author: W.H. Auden

quote: L'art de la productivité est l'art de choisir ce qu'on ne fera pas.
author: Inconnu

quote: One day or day one. You decide.
author: Paulo Coelho

quote: Ne cherchez pas le temps libre, créez-le.
author: Anonyme

quote: The art of being wise is the art of knowing what to overlook.
author: William James

quote: Seul on va plus vite, ensemble on va plus loin.
author: Proverbe africain

quote: Plans are nothing; planning is everything.
author: Dwight D. Eisenhower

quote: L'attention est la forme la plus rare et la plus pure de la générosité.
author: Simone Weil

quote: Time is what we want most, but what we use worst.
author: William Penn

quote: Le succès appartient à ceux qui se lèvent tôt.
author: Proverbe français

quote: Productivity is never an accident. It is always the result of a commitment to excellence, intelligent planning, and focused effort.
author: Paul J. Meyer

quote: Travaillez comme si quelqu'un travaillait 24 heures par jour pour vous dépasser.
author: Inconnu

quote: You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: Il n'y a qu'une façon d'apprendre : par l'action.
author: Paulo Coelho

quote: Success is not final; failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: Mieux vaut faire et se repentir que ne pas faire et se repentir.
author: Niccolò Machiavelli

quote: The scariest moment is always just before you start.
author: Stephen King

quote: Les grandes réalisations sont toujours précédées de grandes pensées.
author: Og Mandino

quote: If you want something done, ask a busy person to do it.
author: Lucille Ball

quote: Soyez le changement que vous souhaitez voir dans le monde.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Absorb what is useful, discard what is useless and add what is specifically your own.
author: Bruce Lee

quote: La priorité est de faire une chose à la fois.
author: Anonyme

quote: Eat a live frog first thing in the morning and nothing worse will happen to you the rest of the day.
author: Mark Twain

quote: L'organisation n'est pas une fin en soi, c'est un moyen d'atteindre ses buts.
author: Inconnu

quote: The road to success and the road to failure are almost exactly the same.
author: Colin R. Davis

quote: La procrastination est le voleur du temps.
author: Edward Young

quote: Motivation is what gets you started. Habit is what keeps you going.
author: Jim Ryun

quote: La vie est trop courte pour être petite.
author: Benjamin Disraeli

quote: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
author: Sam Levenson

quote: Décidez ce que vous voulez. Croyez que vous pouvez l'avoir. Agissez.
author: Jack Canfield

quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: Ce n'est pas le temps qui manque, c'est la priorité que l'on donne aux choses.
author: Inconnu
